childElements.name: displayTheRecordCounts
endDate
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 2, "label" : "End Date", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "dateType" : "string", "modelDateFormat" : "yyyy-MM-dd", "dateFormat" : "YYYY-MM-DD", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "minDate" : "", "maxDate" : "TODAY()" }

childElements.name: healthCareCostDateRangeRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Health Care Cost Date Range Records", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "IF(%hcFilterCount% > 0 && %hcFilterCount% < 4000, true, false)", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : null, "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: includeFuture
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 3, "label" : "Checkbox1", "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : false, "help" : true, "helpText" : "Leave checked to include future care records in the case document generation process.", "helpTextPos" : "bottom-left", "checkLabel" : "Include Future Care", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Messaging1
Messaging2
searchHCC
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 4, "label" : "Count included records", "remoteClass" : "TPL_CaseOmniService", "remoteMethod" : "getHealthCareCostRecordsInDateRange", "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "caseId" : "%ContextId%" }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "startDate" : "%Search:startDate%", "endDate" : "%Search:endDate%", "includeFuture" : "%Search:includeFuture%" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "None", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "useContinuation" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: startDate
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 2, "label" : "Start Date", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "dateType" : "string", "modelDateFormat" : "yyyy-MM-dd", "dateFormat" : "YYYY-MM-DD", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "minDate" : "", "maxDate" : "TODAY()" }

childElements.name: TextBlock1
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "TextBlock1", "text" : "

This case has more records than can be generated in a single document. Please enter a date range that includes 4,000 records or fewer, and indicate whether future care records should be included in this document.

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: Search
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Search Healthcare cost", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : "0", "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : "3", "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "", "saveMessage" : "", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }
